input.background: Say whether each of the boldface numbers is a parameter or a statistic.
input.question: Insured? A data set based on 168 hospital discharge summaries shows that 20% of patients were uninsured. (The review takes place in a large referral hospital.)

uninsured_percentage.description: The percentage of patients who were uninsured in the data set.

total_patients.description: The total number of patients in the hospital discharge summaries data set.
